name: AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of optical, electrical, fluid technology, and integrated solutions in China. Its electrical connectors include various connectors comprising circular, rectangular, data transmission, filter, and network electrical connectors, as well as RF coaxial series adapters; and optical connectors comprise optical passive connectors, optical transceiver modules, and optical and electrical equipment and systems. The company also provides interconnect solutions. Its products are used in the aviation, aerospace and military, telecom and data center equipment, railway transportation, new energy vehicle, power equipment, petroleum equipment, medical equipment, intelligent equipment, and other civil industrial fields. The company also exports its products to approximately 30 countries and regions, including Europe, the United States, Israel, Australia, Korea, India, etc. The company was formerly known as China Aviation Optical-Electrical Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. in July 2016. AVIC Jonhon Optronic Technology Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Luoyang, China.
